name: deepfake-detect-monorepo
description: Fully mocked demo of AI-powered deepfake detection platform

scripts.dev:mobile:clear: pkill -f 'expo|metro' 2>/dev/null; cd apps/mobile && npx expo start --clear
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules .turbo apps/mobile/.metro-cache apps/mobile/.expo apps/web/.vite && npm install
